title: senecio richii
intro: Senecio richii, also known as Groundsel Bush or Fireweed Groundsel, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and easing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio richii is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some preparations also utilizing its roots and leaves.
